# Reservoir Flow Units

**Summary**: Units of rock with similar petrophysical properties and flow characteristics.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] ranked reservoir-flow-units to improve prediction in uncored intervals.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] Used to model and predict reservoir behavior.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] Ranked using RQI values.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Ranked based on RQI values derived from porosity and permeability data. ([[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014, p. 166]])
